extension_name.description: Extension name. Used as the display name in the Chrome Web Store and as the toolbar tooltip.

extension_description.message: Visualize tab overload and tidy up with one click. Fully offline, ad-free, minimal permissions.
extension_description.description: Short description of the extension (within 132 chars). Shown in the Chrome Web Store and browser extensions list.

cleanup_button.description: Label for the popup bulk cleanup button. Closes all tabs that match the current category filter.

undo_button.description: Label for the undo button shown for 30 seconds after a cleanup. Restores the closed tabs via chrome.tabs.create.

undo_notice.description: Toast message shown right after a cleanup. $COUNT$ is the number of tabs that were closed.

whitelist_section_title.description: Heading of the options whitelist section. Manages URL patterns excluded from cleanup.

whitelist_section_hint.message: Add URL patterns to exclude from cleanup. Example: https://*.github.com/*
whitelist_section_hint.description: Description text for the whitelist section, showing an example pattern.

whitelist_pattern_label.description: Label for the URL pattern input in the whitelist add form.

whitelist_pattern_placeholder.description: Placeholder example for the URL pattern input.

whitelist_note_label.description: Label for the optional note input in the whitelist add form.

whitelist_add_button.description: Label for the button that adds an entry to the whitelist.

whitelist_remove_button.description: Label for the remove button on a whitelist entry row.

whitelist_empty.description: Shown when there are no whitelist entries.

whitelist_error_empty.description: Error shown when adding an empty whitelist pattern.

whitelist_error_duplicate.message: This pattern is already in the whitelist.
whitelist_error_duplicate.description: Error shown when adding a duplicate whitelist pattern.

whitelist_error_too_long.description: Error shown when the pattern exceeds the maximum length.

whitelist_error_limit.description: Error shown when the number of whitelist entries reaches the cap.

thresholds_section_title.description: Heading of the options thresholds section. Customizes the tab count at which the badge turns yellow / red.

thresholds_section_hint.message: Tab count thresholds for the toolbar badge color. Gray below yellow, yellow at or above yellow, red at or above red.
thresholds_section_hint.description: Description text for the thresholds section explaining how the values are applied.

thresholds_yellow_label.description: Label for the input that controls the tab count at which the badge turns yellow.

thresholds_red_label.description: Label for the input that controls the tab count at which the badge turns red.

thresholds_save_button.description: Label for the button that saves the threshold values.

thresholds_reset_button.description: Label for the button that resets thresholds to default values (10 / 20).

thresholds_saved_notice.description: Status message shown after thresholds are saved successfully.

thresholds_error_yellow_invalid.message: Yellow threshold must be a number between 1 and 999.
thresholds_error_yellow_invalid.description: Error shown when the yellow threshold input is empty or out of range.

thresholds_error_red_invalid.message: Red threshold must be a number between 1 and 999.
thresholds_error_red_invalid.description: Error shown when the red threshold input is empty or out of range.

thresholds_error_red_not_greater.message: Red threshold must be greater than yellow threshold.
thresholds_error_red_not_greater.description: Error shown when the red threshold is not strictly greater than the yellow threshold.

inactive_section_title.description: Heading of the options inactive threshold section. Customizes how many minutes since last access mark a tab as inactive.

inactive_section_hint.message: Tabs are considered inactive once this many minutes have passed since the last access.
inactive_section_hint.description: Description text for the inactive threshold section explaining how the value is applied.

inactive_minutes_label.description: Label for the input that controls how many minutes since last access mark a tab as inactive.

inactive_save_button.description: Label for the button that saves the inactive minutes value.

inactive_reset_button.description: Label for the button that resets the inactive minutes value to the default (30).

inactive_saved_notice.description: Status message shown after the inactive minutes value is saved successfully.

inactive_error_invalid.message: Inactive minutes must be a number between 1 and 1440.
inactive_error_invalid.description: Error shown when the inactive minutes input is empty or out of range.

search_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the popup search box. Filters tabs by partial match against title and URL.

search_clear_label.description: Aria-label of the search clear button.

search_no_match.description: Shown in the popup list when no tab matches the current search query.

archive_button.description: Label for the popup bulk archive button. Saves matching tabs to storage and then closes them.

archive_notice.description: Toast message shown right after an archive action. $COUNT$ is the number of tabs that were archived.

archive_section_title.description: Heading of the options archive list section. Shows tabs previously archived.

archive_section_hint.message: History of archived tabs. Up to the most recent 500 entries are kept.
archive_section_hint.description: Description text for the archive section explaining the retention cap.

archive_empty.description: Shown when there are no archived tabs.

archive_count_label.description: Shows the number of archived tabs. $COUNT$ is the current archive count.

archive_open_link_label.description: Aria-label for the open-link button on each archive entry that opens the URL in a new tab.

archive_restore_button.description: Label for the restore button on each archive entry. Opens the URL as a new tab via chrome.tabs.create and removes the entry from the archive.

archive_restore_label.description: Aria-label for the restore button: opens the URL in a new tab and removes the entry from the archive list.
